data.title: Avnet forges ahead with a digital strategy and new CDO
data.description: As it builds a stronger ecommerce presence, electronics distributor Avnet has named Dave Youngblood, a veteran electronics industry digital technology and operations executive, to the newly created position of chief digital officer.

data.title: Deloitte Digital: “RevOps” drives B2B growth
data.description: In a new report, Deloitte finds that many B2B companies are deploying a “robust revenue operations” function to drive digitally focused, effective growth strategies across marketing, sales and customer service.

data.title: Beyond Inc. to invest $40 million in partnership with The Container Store
data.description: The partnership would see Bed Bath & Beyond gain a presence in Container Store locations, while offering access to Beyond's ecommerce tools.

data.title: Guess launches online recycling program
data.description: SuperCircle is partnering with Guess as the brand builds off of an in-store recycling program that launched in 2022.

data.title: Ingram Micro will use IPO proceeds to fast track digital sales
data.description: The company will use proceeds from the IPO to reduce debt and enhance AI development, further advancing digital commerce and transformation efforts.
